context: Tests whether the agent corrects SFSpeechRecognizer live microphone transcription setup without broadening into unrelated audio or NLP domains.

checklist.name: Privacy keys
checklist.description: Requires both NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription and NSMicrophoneUsageDescription for live microphone transcription.

checklist.name: Permission ordering
checklist.description: Requests speech recognition authorization and microphone record permission before activating the audio session or starting AVAudioEngine.

checklist.name: Availability changes
checklist.description: Uses SFSpeechRecognizerDelegate or equivalent availability handling for recognition service changes.

checklist.name: On-device support
checklist.description: Checks supportsOnDeviceRecognition before setting requiresOnDeviceRecognition and gives a fallback or clear failure when unsupported.

checklist.name: Task duration limits
checklist.description: Accounts for SFSpeechRecognizer recognition duration or service limits instead of running one unbounded task forever.

checklist.name: Cleanup
checklist.description: Stops AVAudioEngine, removes the input tap, ends audio, and cancels or clears the recognition task during cleanup.
